name: generate-slug
description: Generate an SEO-friendly URL slug, meta description, and tag suggestions from a title.

description.description: Optional longer description to inform slug and meta generation.

language.description: Content language hint (e.g. 'en', 'zh-CN'). Slug will always be ASCII.

slug.description: URL-safe slug using lowercase ASCII letters, numbers, and hyphens.

tags.description: Suggested tags or keywords for the content.

errors.message: Input does not conform to the schema.
Model output does not conform to the schema.
